title: BPSSC Bihar Police Sub Inspector SI Mains Admit Card 2026
short_information: Bihar Police Subordinate Services Commission BPSSC has released the advertisement Bihar Sub Inspector SI 2025 . Those Candidates Are Enrolled with BPSSC Sub Inspector SI 2025 Vacancy Can Download Mains Exam Admit Card / Hall Ticket. For other information related to Bihar Police Sub Inspector 2025 recruitment like age limit, qualification, pay scale and all other information read the advertisement and then apply. Bihar Police Subordinate Services Commission (BPSSC) Bihar Police BPSSC Sub Inspector SI Recruitment 2025 Bihar Police Sub Inspector SI Advt No. : 05/2025 Short Details of Notification
application_fee: General / BC/ EWS / Other State : 100/- SC / ST /: 100/- Pay the Exam Fee Through Online Debit Card, Credit Card, Net Banking, UPI Fee Mode Only BPSSC Sub Inspector SI
eligibility: Bihar Police BPSSC Sub Inspector SI 1799 Bachelor Degree in Any Stream from Any Recognized University In India. Height : Male : 165 CMS, 160 CMS for SC/ST Female : 155 CMS Chest : Male Only : 81-86 CMS, 79-84 CMS (For SC/ST) Running : Male : 1.6 KM in 06 Minutes. Female : 1 Km in 5 Minutes More Eligibility Details Read the Notification Advt No : 05/2025
